headline: Nvidia, AMD See 'Special Treatment' From Trump As Chip Supply Chain Faces New Disruptions
summary: In a move that could potentially disrupt the global semiconductor supply chain, President Trump has allowed Nvidia and AMD processors to China.

headline: Billionaire Investor Buys Google And This Gold Miner Stock
summary: John Paulson's hedge fund discloses the purchase of 9,000 shares of Alphabet.

headline: Billionaire Fund Manager Doubles Down on Nvidia and Key AI Stack Play
summary: Billionaire Philippe Laffont has significantly ramped up his investments in Nvidia and its leading AI-cloud collaborator, CoreWeave.

headline: Jim Cramer Says Don't Quit Market When It's Frothy: 'Is Widespread Irrationality a Reason To Sell Down in Perfectly Rational Stocks? Absolutely Not'
summary: In the face of a frothy market, Jim Cramer encourages investors to stay the course, highlighting numerous positive stock narratives that counterbalance the market's irrationality.

headline: Greenlight Capital Announces Q2 2025 Trades: New Positions in FLR and VSCO, Exit From VTRS
summary: Greenlight Capital, led by David Einhorn, has disclosed its Q2 2025 13F filing trades.

headline: Mexico's 3rd Richest Person Holds 80% Of Their Wealth In Bitcoin, Now They Plan To Make That A 100%: Here Is The Reason Why
summary: Mexican business magnate Ricardo Salinas Pliego has been a strong Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) advocate for years and recently considered allocating the entirety of his wealth to the top cryptocurrency.

headline: Dell, Super Micro Shipments With Nvidia, AMD Chips Secretly Fitted With US Trackers To Detect Diversions To China: Report (UPDATED)
summary: Authorities have secretly placed location tracking devices in targeted shipments of advanced AI chips at risk of illegal diversion to China.

headline: Trump Says Nancy Pelosi Traded On Inside Information—Her 2025 Portfolio Outperforms S&P 500 Thanks To These 4 Stocks
summary: Donald Trump has accused Nancy Pelosi of trading on "inside information" after her portfolio's returns outperformed the S&P 500 in 2025.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Intel, UNH, Rigetti — And All Eyes On Powell
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Costco Refuses To Stock Abortion Pill Mifepristone, Pointing To 'Low Demand' As Activist Groups Step Up Pressure On Retail Giants
summary: Costco won't sell abortion pill mifepristone in U.S. stores due to low demand amid pressure from religious groups.

headline: RFK Jr. Says He's 'Not Running For President In 2028,' As GOP Rift Pitting Steve Bannon, JD Vance And Others Surges Over Trump's Successor
summary: RFK Jr. denies plans to run in 2028 as Steve Bannon weighs a presidential bid that could divide the MAGA base.

headline: Trump Says Xi Jinping Assured China Would 'Never' Invade Taiwan During His Presidency: 'Appreciate That'
summary: Trump said Xi Jinping assured him China would not invade Taiwan during his presidency, even as U.S.–China tensions over trade, technology, and security persist.

headline: Elon Musk's 'Right-Hand Man' Dumps 82% Of Tesla Stake Since 2023 — Gordon Johnson Flags 'Alarming' Insider Sell-Off
summary: Tesla Senior Vice President Tom Zhu has sold over 82% of his shares since 2023, raising concerns about insider confidence amid Elon Musk's attacks on short sellers.
